name: Brandy Wafers (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 450°F or Mark 8.
2. Grease baking sheets.
3. Melt the butter, golden syrup, and caster sugar together in a saucepan over very gentle heat.
4. Stir in the flour, ground ginger, and brandy. Beat until combined for about 5 minutes.
5. Drop small spoonfuls onto the prepared baking sheets, spacing them well apart.
6. Bake for 5 minutes or until pale golden brown in color.
7. Roll the wafers immediately while still hot around the greased handle of a large wooden spoon.
8. Set aside to cool.
These are delicious when filled with freshly whipped cream.
